---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for VaultS3
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A clear description of the use case or pain point. "I'm always frustrated when…"

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like VaultS3 to do.

**S3 compatibility**
If this maps to an S3 API operation or behavior, link the AWS docs so we can
match semantics.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Deployment shape (single-node, multi-disk, cluster), scale, anything else relevant.
